summary.key_theme: 受惠於 AI 需求強勁與記憶體價格上漲，分析師大幅調升目標價，市場對即將公布的財報抱持高度樂觀預期。

bullish.title: Micron Technology (MU) Stock Sees Fair Value Lift As AI Memory Demand Drives Analyst Optimism
bullish.reason: 分析師將公平價值預估從 584.62 美元大幅調升至 866.60 美元，反映市場對 AI 記憶體需求的強勁信心。

bullish.title: Micron Poised to Top Third-Quarter Estimates as Memory Prices Jump, Wedbush Says
bullish.reason: Wedbush 指出記憶體價格跳漲，預期 Micron 第三季財報表現將優於華爾街預期。

bullish.title: Micron (MU) Selects Bechtel for Phase One of New York Semiconductor Complex
bullish.reason: 選定 Bechtel 進行紐約半導體園區第一期工程，顯示公司長期產能擴張計畫穩步推進。

bullish.title: Micron Technology (MU) Is Up 17.0% After Nvidia HBM4 Win And AI Board Hire
bullish.reason: 獲得 Nvidia HBM4 訂單並聘請 AI 領域資深專家 Alexis Black Björlin 加入董事會，強化 AI 競爭力。

bullish.title: MU, WDC, SNDK, STX Stocks Rally Overnight After Apple Flags Memory Cost Surge
bullish.reason: Apple 指出記憶體成本上升，間接證實了記憶體市場供不應求與定價權強勢的現況。

bearish.title: SK Hynix Has a Major Warning for Micron Technology Stock Investors
bearish.reason: SK Hynix 計畫在未來五年大幅增加產能，可能導致未來記憶體市場供給過剩，對 Micron 長期定價能力構成潛在威脅。

neutral.title: Micron Earnings Seen as Key Test for AI-Driven Market Rally (MU)
neutral.reason: 市場將即將公布的財報視為 AI 類股漲勢的關鍵測試，屬於事件前的觀望情緒。

neutral.title: Stock Market Week Ahead: Rebalancing And Technical Support
neutral.reason: 提及 Micron 財報為市場關注焦點，屬於總體市場分析的一部分，對個股無直接影響。

neutral.title: Curious about Micron (MU) Q3 Performance? Explore Wall Street Estimates for Key Metrics
neutral.reason: 僅為財報前夕的數據整理與預測彙整，未提供新的市場觀點。

neutral.title: Zacks Earnings Trends Highlights: Nvidia and Micron
neutral.reason: 將 Micron 與 Nvidia 並列為科技業獲利成長驅動力，屬於產業趨勢分析。
